id.description: Unique identifier of the resource that owns the document. For `type` **legalEntity**, this value is the unique identifier of the [legal entity](https://docs.adyen.com/api-explorer/legalentity/latest/post/legalEntities#responses-200-id). For `type` **bankAccount**, this value is the unique identifier of the [transfer instrument](https://docs.adyen.com/api-explorer/legalentity/latest/post/transferInstruments#responses-200-id).

type.description:
Type of resource that owns the document.

Possible values: **legalEntity**, **bankAccount**.
